description:
Add Explicit Close Button to Gallery View

Implement a visible X (close) button in the gallery view that appears when users click to expand an image, providing a clear way to exit back to the main view.

Requirements:
- Add a clearly visible X button in the expanded gallery view
- Position the button in a standard location (typically top-right corner)
- Ensure button remains visible and accessible regardless of image content or color
- Apply appropriate styling for visibility (consider contrast, drop shadow, or background)
- Close the gallery view and return to previous state when X button is clicked
- Ensure button works on both desktop (mouse click) and mobile (touch)
- Consider adding hover states for better user feedback on desktop
- Maintain existing close functionality (ESC key, background click) alongside the new button
title: Add close button to expanded gallery view
